Appearances:
Plaintiff 2361 Mission Street LlC is present. (Clerk neglectd to get name of representative).
Attorney Howard Olsen appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joseph Tormos is present.
Attorney Joanna Allen representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of SEP-24-2012 remains on calendar.
